_fixture_meta.source: LIVE-RECONCILED (2026-06-26) — shape captured from the Paddle webhook simulator, which delivers a refund adjustment in its INITIAL state. Status literal verified against Paddle docs + paddle-go-sdk constants.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: Status lifecycle CONFIRMED: pending_approval -> (approved | rejected | reversed). The exact approved literal is 'approved' (AdjustmentStatusApproved). Most live refunds enter as 'pending_approval' and require Paddle approval before money moves; the simulator emits both adjustment.created and adjustment.updated as 'pending_approval' (it does not simulate the approval transition).
_fixture_meta.locks: data.status='pending_approval' -> handler MUST IGNORE (Correction B status gate: reverse only on === 'approved'). No ledger touch, no deduct, record + 200.
